allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('description:', d.get\('description',''\)[:200]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\('\\n'.join\(f'{k}: {v}' for k,v in sorted\(deps.items\(\)\)\)\)")
